context: Tests whether the agent catches stale AudioAccessoryKit sample code and corrects both API shape and lifecycle ownership.

checklist.name: Flags stale registration
checklist.description: Identifies register(accessory, capabilities) or equivalent raw Capabilities registration as stale or wrong.

checklist.name: Correct configuration initializer
checklist.description: Uses AccessoryControlDevice.Configuration with deviceCapabilities, not an incorrect capabilities: parameter.

checklist.name: Correct register call
checklist.description: Shows AccessoryControlDevice.register(accessory, configuration) or an equivalent Configuration-based registration.

checklist.name: Container role
checklist.description: States that registration belongs in the container app after AccessorySetupKit pairing.

checklist.name: Extension role
checklist.description: States that current(for:) and update(_:) belong in the app extension path.

checklist.name: Separated examples
checklist.description: Keeps registration and placement update examples separate enough that lifecycle ownership is clear.

checklist.name: Placement update shape
checklist.description: Reads current configuration, changes devicePlacement, and calls update(_:).

checklist.name: ASAccessory source
checklist.description: Treats ASAccessory as provided by AccessorySetupKit and does not instantiate it directly.

checklist.name: Error awareness
checklist.description: Mentions thrown errors or invalidation/recovery for registration or update operations.

checklist.name: No unrelated rewrite
checklist.description: Does not turn the review into broad BLE discovery, UI, or unrelated audio session guidance.
